interactions.summary: A student asks why humanity needs a god via AI; Jiang answers that the design target is control, then states AI imposes hard constraints: clean data and measurable goals.
He describes edge cases as the fundamental risk in machine learning and uses self-driving car behavior as illustration of brittleness and overfitting.
He says AI systems require social context manipulation to be useful, and explains black-box unpredictability via wrong cues like crosswalk-focused pedestrian detection and black-box internals.

speaker_notes.note: Speech has heavy truncation and probable ASR corruption in one clause about a second point; main argument about edge cases and steering-wheel removal is preserved.

claims.claim: Jiang claims that if AI systems are aimed at creating social compliance, they will tend toward designs that support control rather than independent human flourishing.
He defines the three operational constraints of supervised systems as clean data, measurable objectives, and bounded parameters, and treats edge cases as a key fragility vector.
He describes the black-box nature of deep networks as making model behavior difficult to explain and vulnerable to spurious correlations that fail outside narrow training conditions.
claims.temporal_scope: Jiang's technical lecture at class time

signature_moments.source_phrase: AI ... requires reorganizing society; individuality, diversity, and autonomy need to be taken away
signature_moments.why_it_matters: Connects model architecture limits to political-level consequences in a provocative causal chain.

signature_moments.source_phrase: might recognize pedestrians only by crosswalks
signature_moments.why_it_matters: Illustrates the practical danger of pattern-based learning without semantic grounding.

glossary_terms.definition_or_usage: Rare input distributions outside learned examples that trigger failure modes in learned systems.
Model whose internal weights and feature interactions are not directly interpretable in human terms.

chronology_notes.note: This packet bridges from a conceptual discussion of model purpose to explicit technical constraints and then to explainability concerns within the same segment window.

uncertainty_notes.note: One or two words in the 0036 block are garbled; treated conservatively as a steering-wheel thought experiment about preventing edge-case harm.
